# Pull Request

Thank you for contributing to the AI-DevSecOps Command Center! Please fill out
the sections below — they are not bureaucratic, they help reviewers ship your
change faster.

## Summary

<!-- One paragraph: what does this PR do, and why? -->

## Type of change

<!-- Mark all that apply. -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / chore (no functional change)
- [ ] CI / build / infra change
- [ ] Security fix

## Linked issues

<!-- Use `Closes #123`, `Refs #456`, etc. -->

## What changed?

<!-- Bullet list of the user-visible / behavioral changes. -->

## How was it tested?

<!-- Mark the categories that apply and add details. -->

- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Integration tests
- [ ] End-to-end tests
- [ ] Manual verification steps (describe below)

### Manual verification

<!-- Steps a reviewer can run to reproduce / verify. -->

```bash
# example
make up
curl -sS http://localhost:3001/health | jq
```

## Risk & rollback

<!-- What could go wrong? How do we roll back? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project style guide
- [ ] I have added or updated tests for the change
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation
- [ ] I have added an entry to `CHANGELOG.md` under "Unreleased"
- [ ] I have read and agree to the `CONTRIBUTING.md` and `CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md`
- [ ] No secrets, keys, or PII are included in this PR

## Reviewer notes

<!-- Anything specific you want reviewers to focus on. -->
